title: catha rufa
intro: Catha rufa, also known as Somaliland khat, is a plant species native to the Horn of Africa, specifically in Somalia. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to stimulate the nervous system, acting as a central nervous system stimulant. The health benefits of catha rufa include improved mental clarity, increased energy, and enhanced focus, although it can also lead to addiction and other negative effects. Catha rufa is typically consumed as fresh leaves or in herbal preparations, such as tea or infusions, although its use is heavily regulated in some countries due to its potential for abuse.
